arts.ttl: Why were Southampton awarded penalty against Liverpool?
arts.sum: Andy Robertosn tripping winger Tyler Dibling but the foul was ruled to be inside the box

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed 'stupid' verdict amid early penalty drama vs Southampton
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate escaped punishment for a challenge on Adam Armstrong in a dangerous position in the early moments of Southampton vs Liverpool

arts.ttl: Fans fume as Sky Sports miss coverage of Liverpool goal to show 'absolutely pointless replay'
arts.sum: Liverpool took the lead after half an hour of the clash at St Mary's through Dominik Szoboszlai, but Sky Sports were showing a replay of a different incident at the time

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick offers update on Ben Doak and says Liverpool wonderkid's being targeted
arts.sum: Liverpool wonderkid Ben Doak has impressed on loan at Championship side Middlesbrough so far this season and manager Michael Carrick believes he is now being specifically targeted by opposition teams

arts.ttl: Follow LIVE: Liverpool travel to Southampton looking to extend their Premier League lead
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool take on Southampton at St. Mary's hoping to capitalise on Man City's heavy defeat against Tottenham and extend their lead atop the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Southampton v Liverpool team news: Gakpo in for Diaz, Darwin starts
arts.sum: The match at St Mary’s gets underway at 14:00 GMT The post Southampton v Liverpool team news: Gakpo in for Diaz, Darwin starts appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer news: Arsenal, Liverpool to be rivalled in chase for PSV Eindhoven winger?
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly prepared to rival Liverpool and Arsenal in the race to sign PSV Eindhoven winger Johan Bakayoko.

arts.ttl: Southampton v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 2pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Sign up for the Football Daily email 5 min Southampton play out nicely from the back, with Harwood-Bellis finding Fernandes in a bit of space. He cuts across a shot from 25 yards that is comfortably held by Kelleher. 4 min Liverpool have made a relaxed, confident start, with the first few minutes taking place almost exclusively in the Southampton half. arts.ttl: Liverpool line-up for Southampton as three changes made and new injury emerges
arts.sum: Liverpool's team news in full as Alexis Mac Allister and Luis Diaz drop to the bench at Southampton

arts.ttl: Liverpool name lineup to face Southampton as two big names miss out for Reds
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold was taken off in the first half of the 2-0 win over Aston Villa before the international break and subsequently pulled out of the England squad
